name: Pork Salad with Cabbage Slaw
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle pork chops with pepper and nutmeg.
2. Place on the unheated rack of a broiler pan.
3. Broil 4 to 5 minutes from the heat for 18 to 25 minutes or until no longer pink, turning the chops once.
4. Combine cabbage mixture and chopped apple in a large bowl; set aside.
5. Cook bacon in a medium skillet until crisp. Drain bacon, crumble, and set aside.
6. Add vinegar, apple juice, honey, and mustard to skillet; bring to boiling.
7. Pour over coleslaw mixture; add bacon.
8. Toss to mix.
9. Arrange coleslaw mixture on individual serving plates.
10. Cut pork into 1/4 inch thick slices.
11. Arrange pork on top of coleslaw mixture.
